TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Qapuciu, title = Qapuciu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Qapuciu} }

S.FORM: alang Qapuciu ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Sin'iy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 105 buwan, 321 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 55% kyan ku 175 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 45% kyan ku 146 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 54%, Tayan 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Qapuciu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Qapuciu hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Qapuciu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Qapuciu hya' ga llyung. tay 'llaw na Qapuciu hya' ga Isingan. tay 'zil na Qapuciu hya' ga Lanngdun. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Qapuciu ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Sin'iy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 105 buwan, 321 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 55% kyan ku 175 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 45% kyan ku 146 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 54%, Tayan 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Qapuciu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Qapuciu hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Qapuciu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Qapuciu hya' ga llyung. tay 'llaw na Qapuciu hya' ga Isingan. tay 'zil na Qapuciu hya' ga Lanngdun. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ qapuʦ~ʨiu ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu s~ɕinʔij ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, tajan *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na qapuʦ~ʨiu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na qapuʦ~ʨiu ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na qapuʦ~ʨiu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na qapuʦ~ʨiu ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔllaw na qapuʦ~ʨiu ħjaʔ ɣa is~ɕiŋan. taj ʔzil na qapuʦ~ʨiu ħjaʔ ɣa lanŋ*un. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
